subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto thee, that thou mayest be illumined by its lights in these days wherein darkness hath enveloped all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الیک لتستضی ء بانواره فی تلک الایام التی اخذت الظلمات کل
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @suffering and imprisonment
